Label: Champions
Recommendation: Reward with loyalty programs; use for referrals and new product testing.

Label: Loyal Customers
Recommendation: Upsell premium products; offer early access to new inventory.

Label: Potential Loyalists
Recommendation: Frequency programs: reward 3rd and 5th purchases to build habit.

Label: New / One-Time Buyers
Recommendation: Nurture with onboarding sequence; incentivise second purchase within 30 days.

Label: At Risk / Churned
Recommendation: Win-back campaign: personalised discount + re-engagement email sequence.
